text: Honestly, I’m baffled by your enthusiasm for Avatar: Fire and Ash. The film’s attempt at cultural representation feels like a shallow cash grab, recycling the same tired tropes. It’s 2025, and we’re still glorifying this colonial fantasy nonsense? Come on, we deserve better than this overblown CGI mess. Wake up.
